title: Scream & Disappear Death Sounds
description: Plays "scream and disappear" meme sounds when a player dies
body:
This mod adds 9 death sounds that can be configured.

It's funny when someone dies from random thing in a cave and sound physics mod allows for some echo. x)

Sounds include: Tyler1, Emoji Scream, Yoda death sound, Vsause, Moist Cr1tikalz (penguinz0), Tom Scott, Popaye Bisquit Guy, Nikocado Avocado, TommyInnit.
